name: Pigment Paste Blue B-15
shortDescription: Concentrated blue pigment paste for high-brilliance textile printing.
description: Our Blue B-15 is a high-concentration aqueous pigment dispersion designed for exceptional brightness and durability in textile printing. It features excellent light fastness and wash fastness, making it ideal for export-quality fabrics.
features: Ultra-fine particle size for smooth printing
usage: Recommended dosage: 0.5% - 5.0% by weight of paste
Compatible with all aqueous binder systems

name: Acrylic Binder Soft-70
shortDescription: Eco-friendly acrylic binder providing superior soft hand-feel.
description: Soft-70 is a high-performance self-crosslinking acrylic copolymer emulsion. It is specifically formulated to provide an extremely soft handle while maintaining excellent crocking fastness in pigment printing applications.
features: Excellent dry and wet rub fastness
usage: Directly add to the print paste
Standard dosage: 10% - 20% depending on pigment loading
Cure at 150°C for 3 minutes for optimal fastness

name: Pigment Paste Red 3R
shortDescription: Vibrant red pigment with superior wash fastness.
description: Red 3R provides a deep, rich crimson tone with perfect levelness. It is highly resistant to heat and industrial laundering, making it a favorite for workwear and uniform printing segments.
usage: Mix with binder at a ratio of 1:10 for base shades
Adjust viscosity with thickener as required
Best used within 6 months of opening

name: Discharge Paste DP-21
shortDescription: High-white discharge paste for discharge printing on reactive-dyed fabrics.
description: DP-21 is a premium discharge paste specifically designed for high-white results on reactive-dyed dark fabrics. It provides a soft feel, sharp contours, and excellent discharge effect while maintaining the strength of the fabric.
features: Low odor during printing and drying
usage: Use only on dischargeable reactive-dyed fabrics
Dry and cure at 150°C-160°C for 3 minutes for full effect

name: Synthetic Thickener ST-90
shortDescription: High-performance synthetic thickener for aqueous pigment printing systems.
description: ST-90 is a concentrated liquid synthetic thickener developed for high-sharpness pigment printing. It provides excellent flow properties, high color yield, and easy preparation for both manual and automatic screen printing machines.
features: Extremely soft handle in final prints
Easily removed during washing if required
usage: Add to printing paste under high-speed stirring
Adjust pH of printing paste if necessary
Stir well after adding for uniform thickening
